name: Anedot Political Fundraising API
what_it_does: Anedot REST API for political and nonprofit fundraising donation processing platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve donation records and donor data, access campaign and cause financial summaries, sync donor information with CRM systems, retrieve recurring donation status, access FEC-compliant transaction data, manage refunds, and integrate fundraising data with campaign finance reporting systems.
use_cases: Retrieving political donation records for FEC compliance reporting from finance agents
Syncing donor information with CRM from fundraising management agents
Accessing recurring donation status from donor stewardship agents
Integrating fundraising data with campaign finance compliance systems from reporting agents
not_for: Commercial payment processing without political fundraising compliance focus
General nonprofit fundraising without political donation compliance requirements
best_when: A conservative political campaign, PAC, or conservative nonprofit using Anedot wants AI agents to automate donation tracking, donor data sync, and FEC compliance reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data is highly sensitive and subject to FEC reporting requirements. Donor identity data for political contributions has heightened privacy concerns.

auth.notes: Anedot uses API key authentication. Account-level credentials. Webhooks for real-time donation notifications. API access available on higher-tier plans.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan with basic features; API on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Percentage-based transaction fees; Pro plan includes API and advanced features
pricing.notes: Baton Rouge, Louisiana company. Conservative-aligned political fundraising platform. Used by Republican campaigns, conservative PACs, and conservative nonprofits. Competes with WinRed for conservative online fundraising.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Political donation data is subject to FEC reporting and heightened privacy
No public MCP server — REST API with API key
Conservative-aligned platform — not suitable for Democratic campaigns or progressive causes
FEC compliance requirements — donor data must meet contribution limit and disclosure rules
No granular scopes — API key grants full account access
US data residency only — US political fundraising focus
agent_readiness.security_notes: Political donation and donor identity data. PCI-DSS, FEC. API key only, no scopes. US data residency. Conservative-aligned political fundraising. FEC disclosure requirements apply.

security_score_components.security_notes: Political donation data with FEC disclosure requirements. PCI-DSS. API key only. US data residency. Conservative political fundraising platform.
